pharmacies.notes: Novo Nordisk self-pay program. $199/mo first 2 fills for 0.25/0.5mg (new patients through 12/31/2026), then $349 for 0.25/0.5/1mg, $499 for 2mg. Free home delivery via CoAssist Pharmacy.
GoodRx coupon price at 70,000+ pharmacies nationwide via Novo Nordisk partnership. $199/mo first 2 fills (0.25/0.5mg), then $349 for 0.25/0.5/1mg, $499 for 2mg. Avg retail price ~$1,230.
SingleCare coupon price. Typical cash price $1,386.72. Coupon saves ~43% off retail.
NovoCare self-pay pricing via Amazon Pharmacy. Automatic manufacturer coupons at checkout. Home delivery to all 50 states.
$59-$99/mo subscription (Success by Sesame). Medication priced separately. Ozempic $199/mo first 2 fills (0.25/0.5mg), then $349-$499/mo.
Ro Body membership $145/mo program fee. GLP-1s from $349/mo. Insurance or cash-pay. Ozempic available with insurance concierge support.
$49/mo membership. Ozempic $1,199/mo billed separately. Cash-pay only, no insurance accepted.
$19.99/mo membership + $129/visit. Branded GLP-1s ~$1,000/mo out of pocket. Rx Discount Card saves 7-20%.
Membership $25-$49 first month, then $74-$145/mo. Medication not included. Ozempic list price $997.58/mo.
Branded injections via NovoCare pricing $199-$499/mo. Also offers compounded semaglutide $199/mo. Wegovy pill $149/mo.
$39/mo membership (intro rate through Jan 2026, then $119/mo). Medication priced separately. Ozempic $199/mo first 2 fills, then $349-$499/mo.
